title: DIL SE HITS
desc: A comprehensive compilation of some of the most popular songs performed by renowned musical artists is played back to back.

title: Crime Stories
desc: The host presents dramatised re-enactments of real-life criminal incidents that revolve around harassment, murder and kidnappings.

title: Super Nani
desc: When Bharti is mistreated by her family, Manorath, her grandson, gives her a makeover and encourages her to be independent in order to make the family realise her worth.

title: Dirty Politics
desc: In a quest to gain power and influence, Anokhi Devi gets sexually involved with a politician and then blackmails him. When she suddenly goes missing, the CBI tries to track her down.

title: Raazi
desc: As diplomatic tensions rise in 1971, a daring Kashmiri woman walks the tightrope between marriage and duty, delving into the shadows of espionage to protect her motherland.

title: Khushi
desc: Khushi and Karan share a love-hate relationship. Whilst setting their friends up in a relationship, they themselves end up falling in love with each other.

title: Family of Thakurganj
desc: In a small rustic town in UP, two brothers, Nannu and Munnu, chose very different paths. While one chooses a life of crime, the other runs a coaching centre.

title: Hameshaa
desc: Raja and Reshma fall in love but Yash, Raja's childhood friend, likes Reshma so he kills Raja. Years later, the trio is born again to rewrite their stories.
